title: Tenant
description: the customer organisation that owns this DNA — the namespace boundary for everything in their entity graph. A Tenant HAS Brands (one-to-many).

valid_from.description: business-truth window start — when this fact became true in the world; null = since-forever

valid_to.description: business-truth window end — when this fact stopped being true; null = still valid

confidence.description: reliability score for this instance; 1.0 = certain, 0 = no confidence

legal_name.description: formal registered name; differs from `name` which is the display/brand

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code; e.g. 'GB' or 'US:CA'
